overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character walking through a grassy wilderness valley at dusk transitioning into night. The scene features tall grass, pine trees, rocky outcrops, and a dramatic sky that darkens as storm clouds gather and the moon becomes visible.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through tall grass in a valley during the purple dusk

entered.detail: tall green grass covering the valley floor
dense pine trees covering the left hillside
dense pine trees covering the right hillside
rocky cliff face on the right side of the valley
purple and pink colored sky at dusk

segments.scene_description: The character walks steadily through a grassy valley at dusk, surrounded by tall green grass and pine-covered hillsides. A rocky outcrop is visible on the right as the purple sky fades overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland hillside at night under stormy sky

events.description: sky transitions from purple dusk to dark night with the moon becoming visible through clouds
dark storm clouds gather and cover the sky, creating a dramatic night atmosphere

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk uphill through tall grass as night falls and storm clouds gather overhead

entered.detail: dark stormy night sky with heavy cloud cover
bright moon visible through breaks in the storm clouds
leafless dead tree silhouetted on the right hillside

segments.scene_description: As night falls, the character continues walking through the grassy terrain now illuminated by moonlight breaking through gathering storm clouds. The rocky outcrop falls behind as the landscape opens up to reveal a dramatic stormy sky and distant dead trees.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a grassy valley as a peaceful dusk transforms into a dramatic, moonlit storm. It begins with the character walking steadily through tall green grass and pine-covered hillsides under a fading purple sky. As the light dims and night falls, the camera passes a rocky outcrop on the right, leaving it behind as the terrain opens up. The scene then shifts as moonlight breaks through gathering storm clouds, illuminating the grassy landscape and revealing distant dead trees against a turbulent sky.
